description: Inputs for Stage 4.2: run TSS-window encoders/comparators and evaluate the context ablation.
comparison: Canonical CDS embeddings are compared with 196608 bp TSS-centered window features, including TSS NT-v2 and Enformer.

required_inputs.label: TSS NT-v2 meanmean
source_commands: uv run python scripts/run_tss_multi_pool_extract.py --encoder nt_v2 --device auto

metric_commands: uv run python scripts/train_logistic_probe.py --dataset enformer_tss_4mer --task family5
uv run python scripts/train_probe.py --dataset data/dataset_enformer_tss_4mer.parquet --probe-out data/probe_enformer_tss_4mer.npz
uv run python scripts/train_logistic_probe.py --dataset tss_nt_v2_meanmean --task family5
uv run python scripts/train_probe.py --dataset data/dataset_tss_nt_v2_meanmean.parquet --probe-out data/probe_tss_nt_v2_meanmean.npz
uv run python scripts/train_logistic_probe.py --dataset enformer_trunk_global --task family5
